name: Claudia Tenney
stanceSummary: Track AIPAC reports an Israel Lobby Total of $784,341 for Claudia Tenney in U.S. House, NY-24. Public statements and congressional records indicate an Israel-focused security policy posture in recent conflict framing. This candidate has taken funding from the Israel lobby.
